items.description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3agad","text":"Standard protocol for the cryopreservation of C. elegans.\nBased on Cryopreservation of C. elegans and Other Nematodes with Dimethyl Sulfoxide and Trehalose - Kevin F. O’Conne","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
items.materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"jetak","text":"1. Buffer M9:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cs8dl","text":"   a. 3 gramos de Fosfato monopotásico","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"l8df4","text":"   b. 6 gramos de Fosfato disódico","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1sicw","text":"   c. 5 gramos de cloruro de sodio","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"j2gog","text":"   d. 900 mililitros de agua destilada","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bhspn","text":"    i. Ajustar a 1 Litro y autoclavar","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ksjxf","text":"   e. Una vez frío añadir 1ml estéril de 1M de Sulfato de magnesio y mezclar","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gordk","text":"2. Freezing buffer TDMSO","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ftiaj","text":"   a. Trehalosa 0.08M","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"suivl","text":"   b. DMSO 0.5M","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mrksc","text":"      i. Añadir 15.1 gramos de Trehalosa","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"m0b63","text":"      ii. Añadir 17.7 ml de DMSO","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kmn66","text":"      iii. Aforar con 450 ml del Buffer M9","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xshmq","text":"         1. Ajustar a 500 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"secaa","text":"   c. Preservar por máximo 6 meses alicuotando en tubos Falcon de 50 ml con papel aluminio (FOTOSENSIBLE)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"pdfnd","text":"3. Tubos de Falcon de 15 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"qdbhm","text":"4. Pipetas Pasteur","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"awclt","text":"5. Crioviales 1.5 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

items.title: Cryopreservation of labyrinthulomycetes in trehalose

items.before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"chcur","text":"Clean pipettes, tube racks, bench surfaces, tip boxes, etc., with 70% ethanol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"92jr8","text":"Use sterile tips, with or without aerosol barriers","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
items.description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9eub3","text":"Isothermal amplification of a few nanograms of DNA with phi29 DNA polymerase in the presence of trehalose allows for a more stringent amplification temperature that prevents unspecific primer amplification in the water control reaction.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9pgh5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b2885","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aslnr","text":"Spiess, A. N., Mueller, N. \u0026 Ivell, R. Trehalose is a potent PCR enhancer: lowering of DNA melting temperature and thermal stabilization of taq polymerase by the disaccharide trehalose. Clin Chem 50, 1256-1259","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

items.title: phi29 DNA polymerase protocol

payload.step: {"blocks":[{"key":"f64de","text":"1er lavado con 10 ml de tampón M9 estéril a temperatura ambiente y transferir a tubo Falcon de 15 ml.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"pxl1k","text":"2do lavado con 5 ml de tampón M9 estéril a temperatura ambiente y transferir a tubo Falcon de 15 ml.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
{"blocks":[{"key":"9ng5n","text":"Centrifugar a 2000 G por 5 minutos a temperatura ambiente.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"qiirm","text":"Desde la re-suspensión en TDMSO no debe pasar más allá de 15 minutos para mayor viabilidad.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":26,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"0qzvn","text":"Colocar los crioviales en una caja de poliestireno y colocar a -1 ºC por 10 a 15 minutos.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"wk3xy","text":"Probar la viabilidad en 1 semana y tras comprobarla se recomienda dejar 2 tubos en congelador a -80 ºC y otro en nitrógeno líquido.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"xe7gx","text":"Para descongelarlos se recomienda descongelar todo el tubo y verterlo en una placa NGM o congelarlos de costado o boca abajo para poder raspar y revivirlos parcialmente.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
